rationale: max_depth=7 has shown consistent improvement (Δ=-0.000251) across multiple trials. Exploring deeper trees (max_depth=9) may capture more complex patterns in temporal data while staying within reasonable bounds. Exp 337 (max_depth=8, Δ=-0.000182) showed slightly worse performance than max_depth=7, suggesting the optimum may be between 7-9. Testing max_depth=9 to find the peak before diminishing returns.
